common.retry: Please try again in a moment.

landing.subtitle: One line — "Starbucks 6,500 won" — is enough. AI sorts the category, amount and date for you, and each month you get a warm coaching note on your habits.
landing.uspHeading: Personal finance shouldn't be a spreadsheet.
landing.uspSubtitle: One minute a day, a new view of your month.
landing.uspChatDesc: Write "lunch 9k" however you like — AI extracts category, amount and date. Receipts work too.
landing.uspCalendarDesc: See what you've spent and what's coming on one screen, with the real amount left until your next paycheck.
landing.uspMapDesc: Star, photograph and review every spot. A glance tells you where to come back and what to skip.
landing.uspCoachDesc: Log a regret, a win, and a promise — your AI coach compares it to last month and replies with a kind, useful insight.
landing.cta2Heading: Even the first month feels different.
landing.cta2Subtitle: 30 seconds to sign up. No credit card. Free during beta.

login.subtitle: Log in to start your ledger.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.agreeRequired: Please agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter the email you signed up with and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email is registered, we've sent reset instructions. Check your spam folder if you don't see it. The link is valid for 1 hour.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.invalidDesc: Reset token is missing. Use the link from the email again.
reset.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.success: Password changed. Please log in again.

messages.welcomeHint: Just type the way you'd talk — e.g. "lunch kimbap 4,000 KRW today". Tap the 💡 button next to the input to see what you can say. Use the Calendar / Places / Review / Plan / Balance tabs to wrap up the month, and the ✏️ · 🗑 icons on each row to edit or delete an entry.
messages.placeRecognized: 📍 "{{name}}" detected. Open the entry to pick the exact spot.

place.title: Your spending map
place.intro: {{count}} place(s) · tap a pin or card to see map, photos and reviews
place.emptyPins: No pinned places yet. Tap a place card to pick the exact spot.
place.aiHint: (AI-guessed places can be off, so we don't drop pins automatically.)
place.noResults: No results. Try different words or leave the location empty.
